title: rubus lejeunei var. brevis
intro: Rubus lejeunei var. brevis, also known as the short-branched black raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus lejeunei plant, which belongs to the rose family and is native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Rubus lejeunei var. brevis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, among others. The herbal preparations of Rubus lejeunei var. brevis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
